pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 10; verified via grep analysis
Task description (task.json line 5) specifies 'file path: app/src/main/java/com/example/syncapp/service/DataSyncService.kt'; verified against package structure in task description
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 122 and export_result.sh line 13; standard Android project structure
Task description specifies 'Channel ID: `data_sync_channel`'; verified by verifier.py line 103 checking 'data_sync_channel' in service_content
Task description specifies 'Title: `Syncing Data`'; verified by verifier.py line 121 checking 'Syncing Data' in service_content

Task description specifies 'android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync"'; verified via Android Developers documentation - valid foreground service type for data synchronization; matches ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_DATA_SYNC constant
Task description specifies 'Channel name: `Data Sync`'; required parameter for NotificationChannel constructor; verified from official Android task specification

Task description specifies 'Importance: IMPORTANCE_LOW'; verified via Android Developers documentation - constant representing low-priority non-intrusive notifications (value=2); NotificationChannel API requires this parameter
Task description specifies 'Notification ID: 1'; required parameter for startForeground(int, Notification) method call

Task description specifies 'Small icon: `android.R.drawable.ic_popup_sync`'; verified as valid system drawable resource in Android framework at core/res/res/drawable/ic_popup_sync.xml; used for sync animations

Task description specifies 'Returns `START_STICKY`'; verified via Android Developers Service documentation - START_STICKY constant causes service to restart if killed without retaining intent, suitable for indefinite background services
Task description specifies 'onBind(): returns `null`'; verified as correct for non-bindable services; verifier.py checks for onBind returning null via regex patterns at lines 140-145
Task description specifies service declaration attribute 'android:exported="false"'; verified as correct security practice - unexported services cannot be accessed by other applications

Task description specifies permission `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />`; verified via Android Developers documentation as required base permission for all foreground services

Task description specifies permission `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC" />`; verified via Android Developers documentation as required type-specific permission for dataSync foreground services; requires API 34+

setup_task.sh line 75 specifies 'compileSdk = 34'; verified via grep that this is the correct compileSdk value in app/build.gradle.kts; SDK 34 (Android 14) includes support for all foreground service types and required permissions
setup_task.sh line 79 specifies 'minSdk = 26'; verified via grep analysis; Android 8.0 (API 26) is minimum required for modern Service API
setup_task.sh line 80 specifies 'targetSdk = 34'; verified via grep analysis; SDK 34 (Android 14) is the target version and required for FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC permission
setup_task.sh line 29 specifies Kotlin version '1.9.21' in root build.gradle.kts plugins block; verified via grep analysis
setup_task.sh line 240 specifies 'GRADLE_VERSION="8.4"'; verified via grep analysis; Gradle 8.4 is compatible with Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0 used in this project
setup_task.sh line 28 specifies 'id("com.android.application") version "8.2.0"'; verified via grep analysis; AGP 8.2.0 released November 2023 and supports API 34

setup_task.sh lines 97-98 specify 'sourceCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_17' and 'targetCompatibility = JavaVersion.VERSION_17'; verified via grep analysis; setup_task.sh line 252 uses JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64

setup_task.sh line 74 specifies 'namespace = "com.example.syncapp"' and line 78 specifies 'applicationId = "com.example.syncapp"'; verified via grep analysis; service is in subpackage com.example.syncapp.service
setup_task.sh line 137 declares activity as 'android:name=".MainActivity"'; setup_task.sh line 151 shows 'class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity()'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Android task where all project files are generated by setup_task.sh. The task requires adding a foreground service named DataSyncService to the SyncApp project targeting API 34 (Android 14). The service must declare both FOREGROUND_SERVICE and FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC permissions in the manifest and use NotificationChannel ID 'data_sync_channel' with IMPORTANCE_LOW. The startForeground() call uses Notification ID 1 with title 'Syncing Data' and system icon ic_popup_sync, returning START_STICKY from onStartCommand(). The manifest must declare the service with foregroundServiceType="dataSync" and exported="false". Project uses Kotlin 1.9.21, Gradle 8.4, Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0, Java 17, compileSdk/targetSdk 34, minSdk 26. All specifications conform to official Android developer documentation for Android 14 foreground service requirements.
